name: HRC_COMMUNICATION_ACCOUNTS
description: This table stores configuration data of the email accounts from which emails will be read for two way communication.

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier to identify the email entry record

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CLIENT_CONFIGURATION
columns.Comments: Compilation of client related details as a json string

columns.Name: FOLDERS
columns.Comments: Folders from which email has to be read in case of email communication.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: identifier for the source of the account creation

columns.Name: CALLBACK_CLASS
columns.Comments: identifier for any associated callback class with the account

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: identifier from the consumer who created the account

columns.Name: IS_PROCESS_SPECIFIC
columns.Comments: flag to identify if created account is specific to a process

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise id against which this email entry record has been created

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Identifier to recognize the email client type like gmail/outlook

columns.Name: ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Email address from which the messages have to be read

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: Flag that indicates if the communication account is active

columns.Name: SCHEDULED_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the job which is responsible for polling the mail box.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
